title: Growth Manager
location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India / Gurgaon, Haryana, India
role_summary: Drive digital advertising growth by working with clients and partners in India, combining consultative sales, business development, and digital marketing expertise to expand Google's advertising business.
why_good_fit: Your deep experience driving SMB advertiser conversion at Meta, the 2.3% India revenue uplift from the SMB enforcement project, and your Shoppertainment monetisation work directly demonstrate your ability to grow advertising revenue in the Indian market. Your on-ground understanding of how Indian SMBs and advertisers actually operate — voice-led WhatsApp businesses, informal digital literacy — gives you a differentiated edge over candidates with only global or desk-based experience. Your competitive intelligence work (TikTok re-entry strategy, daily monitoring) also maps well to a growth role requiring market awareness.
how_to_win: Lead your pitch with the SMB-to-advertiser conversion story at Meta — how you identified that Indian SMBs were being over-enforced, drove a policy change, and unlocked 2.3% revenue uplift impacting 10M+ businesses. Frame yourself as someone who understands the full funnel from user/business activation to monetisation. Prepare a perspective on Google's India advertising opportunity vs. Meta and short-form video platforms. Emphasize your cross-functional execution style (product, policy, data, marketing) and your AI fluency as a productivity multiplier. Be ready to address the consultative sales angle — frame your stakeholder pitching and buy-in work at Meta as analogous to client-facing growth work.
key_requirements: Bachelor's degree, 5+ years in digital advertising/consultative sales/business development/digital marketing, experience in online media environment.
date_published: Unknown — currently listed on Google Careers

title: Strategy and Operations Lead, GBO Tools
role_summary: Lead strategy and operations for Google's internal business operations tools, combining management consulting-style strategic thinking with program management to drive operational improvements.
why_good_fit: Your half-planning methodology at Meta, structured insight-to-execution pipeline, and experience building an AI-powered personal operating system (80% task automation) demonstrate strong strategic and operational thinking. Your cross-functional leadership across product, policy, data, and marketing teams at Meta mirrors the consulting-style stakeholder management this role demands. Your experience sizing opportunities, building business cases, and pitching to senior leadership (CPO-level influence on TikTok re-entry strategy) aligns with the strategic advisory component.
how_to_win: Position your Meta work as strategy consulting embedded inside a tech company — you identified opportunities, sized them, built business cases, pitched to leadership, and drove execution. Lead with the SMB enforcement project as a case study in end-to-end strategy and operations: discovery → analysis → recommendation → policy change → product team creation → measurable revenue impact. Acknowledge that this isn't a traditional product role but frame your interest in operational excellence and tools (reference your Metamate AI OS as evidence of tools-first thinking). Be prepared to discuss structured frameworks for prioritisation and program management.
key_requirements: Bachelor's degree, 6+ years in management consulting, business strategy, corporate advisory, or program management.
date_published: Unknown — currently listed on Google Careers
